chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Civ. Rev. Appln No.134 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.8440/2023 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Akram, Advocate for the applicant. Ms. Gul Afshan Junejo, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Irshad Ahmed Shaikh, AAG Sindh. -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this revision. He is duly authorized by the vakalatnama for such purpose. Accordingly, this revision is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE Asif
